seoTitle: Beulah Park vs Beverley — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Beulah Park and Beverley. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Beulah Park vs Beverley: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Beulah Park and Beverley.
heading: Beulah Park vs Beverley — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Beulah Park, South Australia and Beverley, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Beulah Park has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Beverley (31/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Beulah Park or Beverley safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Beulah Park has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Beverley scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Beulah Park scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Beverley scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Beulah Park or Beverley?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Beulah Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
